reason_for_decision: The revised article clears the pass threshold with a clearer evidence ladder, better operator framing, and stronger procurement relevance.
strengths: The article now turns terminology into an evidence ladder that is genuinely useful for system design and operations.
It explains why the distinction matters for operator display, escalation, and procurement expectations.
The added procurement questions reduce the risk of vague product claims passing as meaningful capability statements.
summary_assessment: This version passes because it is clearer, more disciplined, and more useful for both operators and buyers than a simple glossary treatment.
